assertions.description: INCORRECT: Units 3 and 4 have input_resistor={ref:R49, ohms:4700}. R49 is part of the R48/R49 voltage divider feeding unit 2's inverting input. The analyzer erroneously associates R49 as an input resistor for these unused units because R49 has one terminal on GND, which is the same net as these units' inputs.
